revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Qq
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|宮城県|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|宮城県|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} {{Commons category|Archaeological sites in Miyagi prefecture}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:宮城県の考古遺跡]]}} {{translated page|ja|Category:宮城県の考古遺跡|version=63002156}} [[Category:Archaeological sites in Japan by prefecture]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:History of Miyagi Prefecture]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[commons:Category:Archaeological sites in Miyagi prefecture]] [[ja:Category:宮城県の考古遺跡]] [[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:宮城県の古墳]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:宮城県の古墳]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Category:日本の都道府県" to "Category:Prefectures of Japan"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Template:Category:Prefectures of Japan/下位|宮城県|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q28863737)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Archaeological sites in Japan by prefecture|宮城県|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{Archaeological sites in Japan by prefecture|宮城県|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} {{Commons category|Archaeological sites in Miyagi prefecture}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:宮城県の考古遺跡}} {{translated page|ja|Category:宮城県の考古遺跡|version=63002156}}
[[co:commons:Category:Archaeological sites in Miyagi prefecture]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:宮城県の考古遺跡]] [[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:宮城県の古墳]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:宮城県の古墳]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|Q28863737}} [[Category:Archaeological sites in Japan by prefecture]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:History of Miyagi Prefecture]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Archaeological sites in Japan by prefecture|宮城県|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{Archaeological sites in Japan by prefecture|宮城県|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} {{Commons category|Archaeological sites in Miyagi prefecture}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:宮城県の考古遺跡}} {{translated page|ja|Category:宮城県の考古遺跡|version=63002156}}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "ategories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q28863737)
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Archaeological sites in Japan by prefecture|宮城県|[[遺跡|考古遺跡]]|考古遺跡|歴史|こうこいせき}} {{座標一覧}} {{Commons category|Archaeological sites in Miyagi prefecture}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:宮城県の考古遺跡}} {{translated page|ja|Category:宮城県の考古遺跡|version=63002156}} {{wikidata link|Q28863737}} <!--interwikis--> [[co:commons:Category:Archaeological sites in Miyagi prefecture]] [[ja:Category:宮城県の考古遺跡]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:宮城県の古墳]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:宮城県の古墳]] [[Category:Archaeological sites in Japan by prefecture]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:History of Miyagi Prefecture]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Archaeological_sites_in_Miyagi_prefecture here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
